title: Make openQA handle requests for huge job groups gracefully

description.motivation: #196709 has shown that o3 yields 502's on huge job groups. We should make openQA handle that gracefully.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: openQA handles job group retrievals gracefully regardless of the amount of included jobs
suggestions: Try with the example job group from #196709 to understand the problem
Analyze the code relevant with doing the lower level database requests and Perl handling
Reproduce the issue with a local test
Build in limiting to abort with clear error message when there are "too many jobs" and/or split the requests into smaller, etc.

journals.author: nicksinger
journals.content: please address the outstanding comments on your PR

journals.author: okurz
journals.content: Accessing https://openqa.opensuse.org also takes very long to render results due to the inclusion of job group 132 "Investigation" that has more than 10k jobs.. Accessing a page like https://openqa.opensuse.org/tests/overview?distri=aeon&distri=microos&distri=openqa&distri=opensuse&version=Tumbleweed&build=&groupid=22&groupid=107&groupid=2&groupid=132 shows a warning "Only 2000 results included, please narrow down your search parameters. " so we already limit the impact of "too big results", that's good. We should consider to use the same or a very similar approach for the job group and index pages.
